headers: Open the Today tab for the simplest plan. Use Quick Picks for alternatives. Tap map links from your phone.

Open the Today tab for the simplest plan.value: One main activity per day, lunch, car nap, one small afternoon stop.
Lakewood Vineyards is the safest family-friendly default.

Best Plan.value: Check in + dinner at Seneca Harbor Station
Watkins Glen State Park + Lakewood Vineyards
Sciencenter + Stewart Park + Purity Ice Cream

Backup if Rain.value: Stay indoors at Sciencenter / Museum of the Earth

Best Plan.value: Corning Museum of Glass + Market Street

Plan.value: Check in → groceries → Seneca Harbor Station → ice cream if energy

Nap / Kid Note.value: Keep it light. No big paid activity.

Plan.value: Watkins Glen State Park → lunch → Lakewood Vineyards → Clute Memorial Park

Nap / Kid Note.value: Car nap after lunch or after winery.

Plan.value: Sciencenter → lunch → Stewart Park → Purity Ice Cream

Nap / Kid Note.value: Use Sciencenter if rain or heat.

Plan.value: Corning Museum of Glass → lunch/Market Street → return to lake

Notes.value: Good first-night waterfront dinner; keep it simple.
Go early; carrier better than stroller on gorge stairs.
Large lawn; easy kid snack stop while one adult tastes.
Best rainy/too-hot option for ages 2 and 5.
Big playground; pair with Purity Ice Cream.
Excellent Thursday/rain option; demos keep kids engaged.
Simple stroll after museum; food nearby.

Why.value: Best rainy day for both kids.
